features.name: base_plate_section
features.description: Clipped section of the outer plate (33mm inward from fork root in both X and Y) providing structural support and flat bed adhesion surface. Uses parent outer plate geometry with rounded corners.

features.name: x_direction_arm
features.description: Branch arm extending in +X from root, 9.0mm wide (ho2_branch_w) and 25mm engagement length. Hull of two cylinders creates rounded-tip geometry. This is the critical dimension being tested for 9.4mm channel fit.

features.name: y_direction_arm
features.description: Branch arm extending in +Y from root, 9.0mm wide (ho2_branch_w) and 25mm engagement length. Hull of two cylinders creates rounded-tip geometry. Identical cross-section to X arm.

features.name: root_blob
features.description: Enlarged cylinder (d=11mm, branch_w+2) at the fork junction for smooth Y-branch transition. Matches parent design root geometry.

printOrientation.bed_face: bottom face of base plate (z=0 plane)
printOrientation.z_direction: plate thickness direction (same as parent design Z)
